description: Phase 14 scan_gate_alignment: every predicate key declared in config/engine_manifest.json pre_commit_hard_gates / pre_commit_advisory must appear as a grep-match in hooks/pre-commit-n6-integrity. Catches drift where gates are declared but never enforced.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_gate_alignment.json ] && jq -r "if (.hook_present == true) and (.unmatched_count == 0) then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_gate_alignment.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
